zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强但动能不足
zh.content:
当前走势呈窄幅震荡偏强结构，价格略高于20日均线，MACD略为负值显示动能仍偏弱，但均线支撑有效，短线维持整理格局延续观望

当前RSI缺失导致超买超卖判断受限，MACD仍处零轴下方微弱负值，反映多头动能不足，20日均线1.13611构成中期支撑参考震荡修复

下方支撑关注1.14319及1.13611均线区域，上方阻力位于1.16整数关口及1.18前高附近，突破需放量确认趋势延续否则维持区间

操作上建议短线高抛低吸为主，未有效突破1.16前不追多，回踩1.143附近可分批试多，严格设置止损控制风险注意仓位管理

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently trading at 1.15062, showing a modest 0.44% daily gain and maintaining a short-term neutral-to-slightly bullish structure. Price action has been relatively compressed, with the pair hovering near its recent intraday high, suggesting consolidation after a mild upward push. The broader trend remains range-bound rather than strongly directional, with buyers gradually defending higher lows but lacking decisive breakout momentum above immediate resistance levels.

Technical indicators reflect mixed momentum conditions. The price remains above the 20-period simple moving average at 1.13611, which supports a cautiously bullish bias in the short term. However, the MACD reading at -0.0002668 indicates weak or fading momentum, suggesting that upward pressure is not yet confirmed. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on moving average and MACD divergence signals.

Key levels show immediate support near 1.13611, aligning with the 20-day SMA, followed by stronger support around 1.12, where previous consolidation zones likely exist. On the upside, resistance is forming around 1.155 to 1.16, which coincides with recent highs and short-term supply. A sustained breakout above this zone could open the path toward 1.18, while failure to break higher may reinforce sideways consolidation.

From a trading perspective, XRP/USD is best approached with a range-trading bias until a clear breakout is confirmed. Long positions may be considered on dips toward the 1.136 support area, with tight risk management below 1.12 to protect against downside extension. Conversely, breakout traders may wait for a decisive close above 1.16 before targeting 1.18. Overall, risk remains balanced, favoring patience over aggressive positioning.
